', "In the latest trading session, Annaly Capital Management (NLY Quick QuoteNLY  -  Free Report)     closed at $20.01, marking no change from the previous day. This has lagged the Finance sector's gain of 4.74% and the S&P 500's gain of 4.67% in that time.", 'Investors will be hoping for strength from Annaly Capital Management as it approaches its next earnings release. Meanwhile, our latest consensus estimate is calling for revenue of $262 million, down 44.86% from the prior-year quarter.', "NLY's full-year Zacks Consensus Estimates are calling for earnings of $2.86 per share and revenue of $911 million. These revisions typically reflect the latest short-term business trends, which can change frequently. As a result, we can interpret positive estimate revisions as a good sign for the company's business outlook.", 'Research indicates that these estimate revisions are directly correlated with near-term share price momentum.
